resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def isPalindrome(self, s: str) -> bool:
        s = ''.join(c for c in s if c.isalnum()).lower()
        return s == s[::-1]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a two-step approach. First, it removes non-alphanumeric characters and converts the string to lowercase. Then, it checks if the resulting string is equal to its reverse. The time complexity is O(n) due to the string reversal operation, and the space complexity is also O(n) for the new string created after filtering non-alphanumeric characters.
